steps.t: The Night-jewel deckhand can be found on the shore of Barad Rill. Daxamat made landfall with his brethren at Barad Rill and then spoke to a deckhand.
The lighthouse of Barad Rill can be found at the centre of the small shoal off the southern coast of Dor-en-Ernil. The deckhand has directed Daxamat t…
The peak of Barad Rill can be found by climbing the stairs in the ruin. Daxamat searched Barad Rill for Balakhôr and climbed toward the top of the rui…
Balakhôr can be found atop Barad Rill. Daxamat then went into Barad Rill to seek Balakhôr at the top.
